eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Missouri; at 01:25 PM ON JAN 31, 2026 Effective until 02:25 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
THIS IS A CANCELLATION OF AN AMBER ALERT THAT WAS ISSUED BY MANSFIELD TEXAS POLICE DEPARTMENT ON 01/30/2026 AT 02:00 AM.  

ABDUCTED WAS EPHRAIM JUAQUIN CARMONA, BI-RACIAL, WHITE AND HISPANIC, MALE, AGE 4. 

THE SUSPECT HAS BEEN TAKEN INTO CUSTODY AND THE CHILD HAS BEEN RECOVERED SAFE
